work.summary: Built and maintained KPI, SLA, billing, and utilisation reporting across a global network of 7 Omnicom networks and 80+ agencies.
highlights: Built and maintained 50+ Power BI and Excel dashboards tracking KPIs, SLA adherence, billing, and utilisation metrics across 7 Omnicom networks and 80+ global agencies.
Reduced manual reporting time by 70% by automating SQL and Excel-based data workflows, freeing team capacity for higher-value analysis.
Consolidated multi-source data from Replicon, Hive, Jira, and Adobe Workfront into structured reports for senior leadership and client-facing stakeholders.
Designed and managed financial approval forms and scope trackers used as project contracts, ensuring governance compliance across all new engagements.
Monitored and resolved quality breaches and delivery delays by coordinating across Resource Management, Project Controllers, and Client Success teams.
Promoted within the Governance team after one year, taking on Creative Services coordination with additional support to Market Research.

work.summary: Analysed recruitment survey data and built dashboards to surface hiring trends for marketing and business development teams.
highlights: Analysed survey datasets from 1,000+ participants using SQL and Excel to uncover hiring trends and candidate engagement patterns.
Developed interactive dashboards to visualise recruitment metrics, enabling data-driven decisions for marketing and business development teams.
Presented findings to stakeholders during live LinkedIn virtual sessions, communicating insights clearly to professional audiences in real time.

work.summary: Supported strategic sales planning with market research and a pipeline tracking tool.
highlights: Conducted market and competitor research to support strategic sales planning and identify growth opportunities.
Built an Excel-based pipeline tracker to monitor leads, proposals, and deal status, improving sales team visibility and reporting.

education.summary: Key papers: Data Mastery (Scripting, Databases & Data Privacy), Multivariate Analysis for Big Data, Practical Data Mining, Applied Econometric Methods, Customer Insights, Return on Marketing Investment.
Electives: Principles of Management, Statistics & Numerical Methods, Cost Estimation, Process Planning.

certifications.title: SAS Academic Specialisation in Business Analytics
Microsoft Career Essentials in Project Management
Microsoft Career Essentials in Business Analysis
